Amended Petition Of Dianne Bowman To Perpetuate Testimony Of Richard Bowman By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Jun-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
MATTHEW Da VEGA, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: Diane Bowman
Carlos Jimenez, Atty. for Defendant and opposing party: Lilja Corp.
Janice W. Man, Atty. for Defendant and opposing party: Boiler Works, Inc.
Maria Solomon-Williams, Atty. for Defendant and opposing party: Saint-Gobain

AFTER HEARING, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Petition Of Dianne Bowman To Perpetuate Testimony Of Richard Bowman By Videotaped Deposition is granted. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Petition Of Dianne Bowman To Perpetuate Testimony Of Richard Bowman By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar May-13-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Dianne Bowman's Petition To Perpetuate Testimony Of Richard Bowman By Videotaped Deposition is ordered off calendar. The notice was insufficient per C.C.P. Sections 1005 and 1013. The motion must be filed, as well as served, 16 court days prior to the hearing, plus 5 days for mailing. This motion was filed on April 21, 2009. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
